overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive along a wet highway at dusk. The camera travels past an industrial complex with smokestacks, under a concrete overpass, and transitions to the road shoulder as the moon rises over a forested hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with industrial skyline and overpass

agents.ego_description: driving along the right lane of a multi-lane highway, approaching a massive industrial complex with smokestacks

notable_agents.action: dark pickup truck overtaking on the right side, moving ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large industrial facility with multiple smokestacks emitting smoke against the sunset sky
elevated highway overpass with metal railings spanning across the left side
futuristic linear LED street light pole with long horizontal lamp
distant street light along the highway curve

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet multi-lane highway at dusk, driving toward an imposing industrial complex with smokestacks dominating the horizon. A concrete overpass looms on the left while futuristic linear street lights line the road. A pickup truck overtakes on the right as the camera maintains a steady speed along the curving road.

events.description: passing under and beyond the concrete overpass, opening up the view to the industrial skyline
sedan with headlights on approaches from behind and passes the camera vehicle on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved highway, maintaining speed as dusk deepens and street lights become more prominent

notable_agents.action: sedan approaching from behind and passing on the left lane

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the concrete overpass and continues along the curve, with the industrial complex now closer and more detailed. Multiple vehicles pass by as the natural light fades and artificial street lighting takes over. The overpass recedes behind as the road opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with forested hillside and moon view

events.description: camera vehicle moves from the main travel lane to the right shoulder near the guardrail
full moon becomes visible in the darkening sky above the forested hillside

agents.ego_description: driving on the road shoulder, closer to the guardrail, with vehicles passing on the left side of the road

entered.detail: silver metal guardrail along the road edge with reflective markers
steep hillside with scattered pine trees rising beside the highway
bright full moon visible in the twilight sky above the industrial complex

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to the highway shoulder, bringing the metal guardrail close on the left. The industrial complex recedes into the distance as a forested hillside rises beside the road. The full moon becomes visible in the darkening sky, and the scene becomes more isolated with fewer vehicles passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with close guardrail and distant industrial towers

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder at steady speed, passing close by sequential street lights with the guardrail immediately to the left

entered.detail: next street light in the sequence approaching from the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the narrow shoulder with the metal guardrail immediately adjacent on the left. The forested hillside looms close while the industrial complex remains visible but distant in the background. The full moon hangs high in the dark sky as the camera passes periodic street lights, maintaining a steady pace along the curving road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a wet highway at dusk that transforms from a bustling industrial corridor into a secluded moonlit road. It begins on a multi-lane highway heading toward an imposing complex of smokestacks, passing under a concrete overpass as futuristic street lights flicker on and a pickup truck overtakes on the right. As the camera continues along the curve, the natural light fades and the industrial structures grow more detailed before the road opens up and the overpass recedes. The scene then shifts toward the highway shoulder, bringing the metal guardrail close as the industrial complex falls behind and a forested hillside rises beside the road. Finally, the camera maintains a steady pace along the narrow shoulder under a dark sky where a full moon hangs high, passing periodic street lights in an increasingly isolated landscape.
